ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Reset To Aug-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Lara S. Hilley, Esq. appeared with Carmen Ford Singleton, Legal Guardian of the minor Michael Milton, who was not present at today's hearing.
Ms. Singleton was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with this morning's hearing as there is no indication in the case file that the minor's parents were given proper notice of today's hearing.

Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to August 25, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for hearing on the proposed name change of the minor. No further publication is required by petitioner.

Reissed Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
